property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: The API name of the related object (e.g. Contact, Opportunity)

property.name: parentFieldApiName
property.label: Parent Field API Name
property.description: The lookup field on the child object that points to this record (e.g. AccountId)

property.name: fieldsString
property.label: Fields (comma separated)
property.description: Comma separated list of field API names to display (e.g. Name,Phone,Email)

property.name: objectIconName
property.label: Object Icon Name
property.description: SLDS icon name e.g. standard:opportunity, standard:contact
